mapper.select: select ck_streamer, ck_side, ck_position, streamer_soop_id, streamer_name, ck_winner from ck_team where ck_id = #{ckId} order by case ck_side when 'red' then 1 when 'blue'then 2 end, case ck_position when 'TOP' then 1 when 'JUG' then 2 when 'MID' then 3 when 'AD' then 4 when 'SUP' then 5 end
select count(*) from ck_list where ck_streamer = #{streamerNo}

select vs_streamer_no, vs_streamer_name, ck_position, sum (case when ck_result = '승리' then 1 else 0 end) as winCount, sum (case when ck_result = '패배' then 1 else 0 end) as loseCount from ck_list where ck_streamer = #{streamerNo} group by vs_streamer_no, vs_streamer_name, ck_position order by vs_streamer_name, case ck_position when 'TOP' then 1 when 'JUG' then 2 when 'MID' then 3 when 'AD' then 4 when 'SUP' then 5 else 6 end
mapper.update:
update ck
ck_date=#{ckDate},
ck_memo=#{ckMemo},
ck_winner=#{ckWinner},
where ck_id=#{ckId}
